punch.name: Punch
punch.description: Basic attack dealing damage equal to your Attack stat

fury.name: Fury
fury.description: Gain Increase Speed buff for 3 turns

throw_rock.name: Throw Rock
throw_rock.description: Throw a rock dealing 2x INT damage and stunning for 1 turn

slash.name: Slash
slash.description: Deals 5% of target's max HP or 5 damage, whichever is lower.

bite.name: Bite
bite.description: Deals 5% of target's max HP or 5 damage, whichever is higher.

spear_thrust.name: Spear Thrust
spear_thrust.description: Thrust spear dealing 1.5x STR damage with 30% chance to cause Bleed

defensive_formation.name: Defensive Formation
defensive_formation.description: Take a defensive stance, gaining Increase Defense for 2 turns

crushing_strike.name: Crushing Strike
crushing_strike.description: Heavy hammer strike dealing 2x STR damage

armor_break.name: Armor Break
armor_break.description: Break enemy armor dealing 1.5x STR damage and applying Reduce Defense

crystal_shard.name: Crystal Shard
crystal_shard.description: Hurl a magical crystal dealing 1.8x INT damage

protective_barrier.name: Protective Barrier
protective_barrier.description: Grant lowest HP ally a 50 HP Shield

staff_whack.name: Staff Whack
staff_whack.description: Basic staff attack dealing 1.2x STR damage

ancestral_taunt.name: Ancestral Taunt
ancestral_taunt.description: Force all enemies to attack this unit for 1 turns

chieftains_hammer.name: Chieftain's Hammer
chieftains_hammer.description: Mighty hammer blow dealing 2x STR damage with 15% chance to Stun

war_cry.name: War Cry
war_cry.description: Rally allies with Increase Attack for 3 turns and gain Increase Speed for 1 turn

frost_breath.name: Frost Breath
frost_breath.description: Breathe frost on all enemies, applying Reduce Speed

gold_toss.name: Gold Toss
gold_toss.description: Throw gold coins dealing random damage

win.name: Win
win.description: Instantly defeat all enemies and gain Increase Speed

increase_attack_test.name: Increase Attack Test
increase_attack_test.description: Grants Increase Attack buff for 2 turns

increase_speed_test.name: Increase Speed Test
increase_speed_test.description: Grants Increase Speed buff for 2 turns

increase_defense_test.name: Increase Defense Test
increase_defense_test.description: Grants Increase Defense buff for 2 turns

shield_test.name: Shield Test
shield_test.description: Grants Shield buff that absorbs 200 damage

reduce_attack_test.name: Reduce Attack Test
reduce_attack_test.description: Inflicts Reduce Attack debuff for 2 turns

reduce_speed_test.name: Reduce Speed Test
reduce_speed_test.description: Inflicts Reduce Speed debuff for 2 turns

reduce_defense_test.name: Reduce Defense Test
reduce_defense_test.description: Inflicts Reduce Defense debuff for 2 turns

taunt_test.name: Taunt Test
taunt_test.description: Forces enemies to attack this unit for 2 turns
